calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-20-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Daniel Bornstein, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Kevin Alkire, Assistant Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lucretia Hicks, a/k/a Lacrecia Hicks.
Case settled as to defendant DeMarco Reed on October 16, 2008.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 2, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mercy Housing California, and against defendant Lucretia Hicks, a/k/a Lacretia Hicks as follows:

Plaintiff Mercy Housing California shall recover from defendant Lucretia Hicks, a/k/a Lacretia Hicks, Rent/Holdover Damages in the amount of $886.60, with Costs to be determined pursuant to submission of a memorandum of costs, for a Total Judgment in the amount of $886.60.

Plaintiff Mercy Housing California is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 172 6th Street, #209, San Francisco, CA 94103. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Bornstein for Mercy Housing California, who is present.
Jeffery Woo for Demarco Reed, who is present.

Settlement conference held. Case settled only as to Demarco Reed. Parties entered into an agreement, which was not filed with this court. settlement terms contained in the agreement for premises located at 172 6th street, #209, San Francisco, CA. This matter will remain on the trial calendar for 10/20/08 as to Lacrecia Hicks.

Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, Clerk Melinka Jones, not reported (218)
